notes.AGPL-*: Network use = distribution. Using any AGPL lib in a SaaS forces open-sourcing our entire stack.
notes.SSPL-1.0: MongoDB's server-side license. Effectively AGPL for SaaS.
notes.GPL-*: Distribution triggers copyleft. OK for CLI tooling, never for web-server runtime deps.
notes.LGPL-*: Static linking triggers copyleft. OK if dynamically linked only.
notes.UNKNOWN: No license field or unresolvable expression — must investigate manually.
notes.MPL-2.0: File-level copyleft. Usually OK but flagged for review.
